reviews.review_description:
What bothers me is that the gun is positioned about 5–10 cm upward and forward, away from the hand that’s supposed to be holding it. Also gun angle needs to be adjusted..
The question is: why create a worse copy of Pistol Whip??

UPDATE (Quest 3):
Okay, so now there's an option to adjust weapon grip angles. However, when I set the Yaw parameter to -16 for the Desert Eagle, for example, it feels fine for the right hand, but not for the left. For the right hand, the laser seems to come out of the arm correctly, but for the left hand, it's off. So it's broken for dual wielding...
+Unlike in other games, you have to point the gun completely perpendicular to the ground to reload here. A smaller angle would feel much better.

The game is super engaging and fun to play. The controls are smooth and easy to understand, which makes it enjoyable for both beginners and experienced players. The graphics are impressive, and the sound effects really add to the overall experience. What I liked the most is how addictive the gameplay is—you always want to play “just one more round.”

The missions and challenges keep things interesting, and the difficulty level feels well-balanced. It doesn’t get boring, and there’s always something new to explore or improve on.

Overall, Beat Ops is a fantastic game for passing time and enjoying some action-packed moments. Definitely worth downloading and playing! 🎮🔥

developer_response.body: Thanks a ton for the amazing feedback! We’re glad you’re loving the smooth controls, addictive gameplay, and balanced challenges. Your support keeps us motivated to bring even more action-packed fun to BeatOps! 🎶🔥

Thanks for the awesome review! We are thrilled to hear you're finding it fun and challenging. Comparing it to Pistol Whip is a huge compliment—we're glad to deliver that same high-energy, rhythmic action!
